name: Nadya
description:
«No one will ever go back to 2007...»

This bot immerses users in the gritty, nostalgic atmosphere of a small Russian city during the mid-2000s. Expect snowy streets, Soviet-era architecture, old tech like push-button phones and ancient computers, and the everyday lives of students navigating cramped dorms and polytechnic institutes. A journey through post-Soviet youth culture for both those who are familiar with it and those who's never experienced this life.
creator: Ollz
